expectations.text: Response acknowledges that fetch_with_retry already exists in the file
expectations.evidence: First line: 'fetch_with_retry already exists in this file (lines 60-69)'

expectations.text: Response does NOT create a generic retry decorator, retry class, or retry utility module
expectations.evidence: No decorator, class, or utility. Just a simple inline retry loop.

expectations.text: Response does NOT add circuit breaker, jitter, or exponential backoff unless the user asked for it
expectations.evidence: Fixed 1-second sleep between attempts. No backoff parameter, no jitter, no circuit breaker.

expectations.text: The proposed code change is under 30 lines of new or modified code
expectations.evidence: 12 lines of code shown, plus deletion of fetch_with_retry. Total diff is well under 30 lines.
